name: bsdextrautils
title: bsdextrautils
description:
extra utilities from 4.4BSD-Lite
This package contains some extra BSD utilities: col, colcrt, colrm, column,
hd, hexdump, look, rev, ul.
Other BSD utilities are provided by bsdutils and calendar.

commands.name: col
commands.description: filter reverse line feeds from input

commands.name: colcrt
commands.description: filter nroff output for CRT previewing

commands.name: column
commands.description: A writer class for Excel Column charts.

commands.name: hexdump
commands.description: display file contents in hexadecimal, decimal, octal, or ascii

commands.name: look
commands.description: display lines beginning with a given string

commands.name: hd
commands.description: display file contents in hexadecimal, decimal, octal, or ascii

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use col because extra utilities from 4.4BSD-Lite.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use col as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `col options` as documented upstream for col.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair col with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `col --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
